tasks.title: Review crates/ragent-tui/src/app/ for compliance, anti-patterns and security
tasks.description: Thoroughly review all Rust source files in crates/ragent-tui/src/app/ (and subdirectories). Check for: (1) AGENTS.md compliance (naming, error handling, logging, docs, units, test organisation, code style), (2) Rust anti-patterns (unwrap/expect abuse, cloning unnecessarily, blocking async, improper error propagation, unused variables/imports, dead code, large functions, magic numbers, etc.), (3) security issues (unsafe blocks, credential exposure, input validation, panic paths, integer overflow, dependency risks). For each issue found record: file, line range, severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), category, description, and recommended fix. Write your findings as a structured JSON file to /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/app-findings.json

tasks.title: Review crates/ragent-tui/src/ui/ for compliance, anti-patterns and security
tasks.description: Thoroughly review all Rust source files in crates/ragent-tui/src/ui/ (and subdirectories - layout, widgets, panels, etc). Check for: (1) AGENTS.md compliance (naming conventions snake_case/PascalCase, error handling with Result/?, logging with tracing not println!, doc comments on all public APIs, code style 4-space indent, max 100 width), (2) Rust anti-patterns (unwrap/expect misuse, unnecessary clones, large monolithic functions, cognitive complexity >30, wildcard imports, magic numbers, dead code, unused imports), (3) security issues (panic paths, integer overflow/underflow in layout arithmetic, unsafe blocks, bounds checking). For each issue found record: file, line range, severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), category, description, and recommended fix. Write your findings as a structured JSON file to /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/ui-findings.json

tasks.title: Review crates/ragent-tui/src/ root files, Cargo.toml and non-app/ui modules
tasks.description: Thoroughly review all remaining Rust source files in crates/ragent-tui/ that are NOT in src/app/ or src/ui/ - this includes lib.rs, main.rs, any input handling, event handling, config, state, and the Cargo.toml for the crate. Check for: (1) AGENTS.md compliance (naming, error handling, logging, docs, units, test organisation), (2) Rust anti-patterns (unwrap/expect abuse, unnecessary Arc/Mutex overhead, blocking in async contexts, improper channel usage, large match blocks, magic numbers, dead code, unused dependencies in Cargo.toml), (3) security issues (dependency versions with known CVEs - check with `cargo audit` if possible, credential/token handling, panic paths, unsafe code). For each issue found record: file, line range, severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), category, description, and recommended fix. Write your findings as a structured JSON file to /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/core-findings.json

tasks.title: Review crates/ragent-tui tests and run cargo check/clippy
tasks.description: Thoroughly review all test files in crates/ragent-tui/tests/ (and any inline tests remaining in src/). Check for: (1) AGENTS.md compliance - tests MUST be in tests/ folder not inline in src/, correct naming convention test_<component>_<scenario>, use #[test] and #[tokio::test], import from public crate, (2) test quality anti-patterns (no assertions, testing implementation not behaviour, fragile tests, missing edge cases, no error path testing, tests that only test happy path), (3) test organisation issues (tests in wrong location, missing test coverage for critical paths, tests that never fail). Also run `cargo check` and `cargo clippy` on the crates/ragent-tui crate and capture all warnings/errors. Write your findings as a structured JSON file to /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/test-findings.json. Also write the clippy/check output to /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/clippy-output.txt

tasks.title: Synthesise all review findings into docs/reports/ragent-tui-compliance.md
tasks.description: After tasks task-001 through task-004 are complete, synthesise all findings from these JSON files: /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/app-findings.json, /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/ui-findings.json, /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/core-findings.json, /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/test-findings.json, and /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/.ragent/teams/tui-review/clippy-output.txt. Create a comprehensive report at /home/thawkins/Projects/ragent/docs/reports/ragent-tui-compliance.md. The report MUST include: 1) Executive Summary with overall health rating, 2) Issue Summary table (counts by severity and category), 3) Detailed Findings section with all issues grouped by category (Security, Compliance, Anti-patterns, Test Quality), 4) Milestones section (M1: Critical fixes, M2: High priority, M3: Medium/Low polish) each with specific numbered Tasks referencing the issue details, 5) Appendix with raw clippy output. Format as clean professional Markdown.
